pi_items.source: Verified by reading setup_task.sh which creates and populates this directory.
Counted exactly 18 'def test_' functions defined in the test files generated by setup_task.sh.
Verified by reviewing verifier.py which correctly assigns these specific points to each section.

privileged_info_summary: The task accurately targets /home/ga/PycharmProjects/packet_parser and the point assignments per section are correct. However, the claim of 29 expected tests is false; the setup script only generates 18 actual test cases. The testing data utilizes real, non-synthetic network packet captures embedded as hex dumps.
